title: Segfault/assertion in frontend
body:
There seems to be some memory corruption introduced in commit f0afd65035fefebdea8edbd00c916c5f33e8a634 that causes random segfaults or assertions of this kind:
ERROR: Assert `p[0] == '$' || p[0] == '\\'' failed in ./kernel/rtlil.h:153.

I'm not able to reproduce it with a simple example. I've attached a zip file with my code that can be built with this command line:
yosys -q -p "synth_ice40 -abc2 -json gameboy.json" ./lr35902_map.v ./lr35902_iomap.v ./cpu/lr35902_cpu.v ./cpu/lr35902_hram.v ./cpu/lr35902_dbg_ifc.v ./ppu/lr35902_ppu.v ./ppu/lr35902_vram.v ./ppu/lr35902_oam.v ./ppu/lr35902_oam_dma.v ./lr35902_brom.v ./lr35902_tim.v ./lr35902_apu.v ./lr35902_p1.v ./prog_loader.v ./cdc.v ./uart_recv.v ./uart_send.v ./ft245_ifc.v ./boards/gbreveng-top.v ./elp/lr35902_elp_dummy.v ./lcds/lcd_lh507x.v ./mbc/mbc1.v

[gameboy.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/4466734/gameboy.zip)

The problematic commit gets merged in b597f85b13b5369398350ef4ef43b7b2521eb140, so every version of yosys newer than that has this issue. I have built yosys with clang and gcc. The problem exists in both, but for some commit/compiler-combinations it doesn't show up until I start making changes to my verilog code. I also had a combination where yosys ran successfully without segfault or assertion, but then the resulting json file was corrupted and nextpnr complained about it. I'm afraid the symptoms highly depend on the memory layout of the produced yosys binary, maybe you can't reproduce this on your system.

I made two stack traces with GDB, one that shows where the assertion gets triggered and one with the segfault:

-------------------------------------------------------------
clang version 3.4.2 (tags/RELEASE_34/dot2-final)
yosys commit f0afd65035fefebdea8edbd00c916c5f33e8a634
-------------------------------------------------------------
ERROR: Assert `p[0] == '$' || p[0] == '\\'' failed in ./kernel/rtlil.h:153.
